creator: tps@vr-web.de
text:
svn: E155017: Checksum mismatch while updating '/usr/ports/x11/gnome-desktop/Makefile':
   expected:  5acf8a499e9c642e1b4634276860119f
     actual:  06733e90756a41661559af78ea455fed

this was only one example. There are a lot others.

removing /usr/ports/x11/gnome-desktop/Makefile or the whole directory /usr/ports/x11/gnome-desktop, then updating the tree does not solve the problem. Looks like the wrong checksum is on the server.

How-To-Repeat: Since today, 6. Nov. 2013, 11:00 CET.
At least until 13:35 CET.
